# BL Agency

> BL Agency builds and operates outbound acquisition systems for B2B companies. We run your entire SDR function — LinkedIn prospecting, cold email, inbox management, and meeting booking — so you get a predictable flow of qualified sales conversations without the overhead of hiring.

## What we do

BL Agency provides SDR as a Service for B2B companies. We handle the full outbound sales function on behalf of our clients, including market mapping, ICP development, LinkedIn outreach campaigns, cold email sequences, inbox management, prospect qualification, and booked meeting delivery.

## Who we serve

We work with B2B agencies, SaaS companies, consultants, coaches, and service businesses — especially those with offers worth $2,000+ per month who need a repeatable outbound pipeline and want to outsource the entire SDR function.

## Track record

- $7.2M+ in revenue opportunities opened for clients
- 100+ B2B clients served across agencies, SaaS, and consulting
- 6 years building outbound systems for B2B companies worldwide

## Our process

1. Market mapping and ICP development
2. Infrastructure setup and email warm-up (3 weeks)
3. Campaign launch across LinkedIn and cold email
4. Inbox management, qualification, and meeting booking
5. Weekly reporting on pipeline and conversion data

## Founder

Veronica Grados — founder of BL Agency with 6+ years in B2B outbound sales, GTM systems, and revenue operations. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/veronica-grados/
